title: Alpinestars SM-5 Course Blue

specs.material: Carbon Fiber Composite Shell with EPS Liner

technical_analysis: The Alpinestars SM-5 Course Blue utilizes a multi-density EPS liner system designed to optimize energy absorption across varying impact vectors. The outer shell is constructed from high-grade carbon fiber composite, offering an exceptional strength-to-weight ratio that reduces rotational forces during lateral impacts while maintaining structural rigidity. Integrated with the MIPS (Multi-directional Impact Protection System) technology, the helmet features a low-friction slip plane that allows the inner liner to rotate independently of the head upon oblique impacts, significantly reducing the risk of traumatic brain injury.
marketing_description: Experience the perfect blend of race-ready performance and everyday versatility with the Alpinestars SM-5 Course Blue. Designed for riders who demand precision engineering without compromising on style, this helmet features a sleek, aerodynamic profile that cuts through the wind while delivering superior cooling through strategically placed vents. The vibrant blue finish is complemented by premium graphics that make a statement on the track or the street.
yoast_metadesc: Discover the Alpinestars SM-5 Course Blue: a lightweight carbon fiber full-face helmet with MIPS technology, ECE 22.06 certification, and optimized aerodynamics for serious riders.
